title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China unveiled JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a split AI brain for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for service and industrial work. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor and Unitree H2 integration for researchers.
